case_title: JANET ELLEN DARCEY VS. BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARCEY, JANET ELLEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JANET ELLEN DARCEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY JACKSON OPERATION ANALYSIS. DEFENDANT HAS 3 WITNESS THAT WERE PRESENT AT THE TIME OF PLAINTIFF'S COLLECTION OF HER BELONGINGS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARCEY, JANET ELLEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CT CORPORATIONS SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARCEY, JANET ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-07-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JANET ELLEN DARCY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DULCE MARROQUIN, OFFICER COURT APPEARANCE ASSOCIATE IS PRESENT. PARTIES ARE TO BRING PHOTOS OF THE ITEMS AND WITNESSES PRESENT AT THE TIME OF THE INCIDENT AS ADVISED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF TO BRING EVIDENCE FOR LOSS OF MEDAL OF STUDENT BODY SECRETARY. PLAINTIFF SHOULD PROVIDE ANY OTHER PERSONS THAT HAVE KNOWLEDGE THAT PLAINTIFF RECEIVED SUCH A MEDAL AND KNEW FROM ANY SOURCE THAT MEDAL WAS IN THE SAFE DEPOSIT BOX. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DARCEY, JANET ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARCEY, JANET ELLEN

(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAI MS):THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.[X] EXPLANATION: PLAINTIFF FAILED TO BRING THIS REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER THE CLERK MAILED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO THE PARTIES (JANUARY 08,2020)[X] EXPLANATION FOR DECISION; PLEASE SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 116.725-CORRECTION OF ERRORS.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-06-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DARCEY, JANET ELLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT DEFENDANTS ACTED NEGLIGENTLY IN ADMINISTERING PLAINTIFF'S SAFE DEPOSIT BOX, AND ITS CONTENTS, SO THAT LOSS OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY OCCURRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
